summary: Iteration 6: Verified directory card improvements and new residing_in profile field. All features working correctly - backend accepts residing_in field, frontend shows it in DirectoryPage (with MapPin icon), OnboardingPage, and ProfileEditDialog. Directory grid uses 3-column layout, no truncation on experience/aspirations, members sorted alphabetically.
critical_code_review_comments: DirectoryPage.js: No truncation classes (line-clamp, truncate) - experience/aspirations show full text
DirectoryPage.js: Grid uses lg:grid-cols-3 (3-column layout as required)
DirectoryPage.js: MapPin icon imported from lucide-react and used for residing_in display
DirectoryPage.js: Members sorted alphabetically using .sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name))
DirectoryPage.js: Search placeholder includes 'location' for residing_in search
OnboardingPage.js: residing_in input field with placeholder 'e.g. Mumbai, India'
DashboardPage.js: ProfileEditDialog includes residing_in input field
schemas.py: OnboardingData model includes residing_in: Optional[str] = ''
members.py: Both /profile/onboarding and /profile/update persist residing_in field
auth.py: New user creation includes residing_in: '' field
test_credentials: Test session created via mongosh (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 6 verified: residing_in field works end-to-end (backend accepts, frontend displays in directory cards with MapPin icon, editable in onboarding and profile edit). Directory cards show full experience/aspirations without truncation, all skills displayed (no +N), 3-column grid layout, alphabetical sorting by name. Previous iterations 1-5 all passed.
verified_features: Backend: PUT /api/profile/onboarding accepts residing_in field (returns 401 without auth - expected)
Backend: PUT /api/profile/update accepts residing_in field and persists it correctly
Frontend: DirectoryPage shows full experience/aspirations (no line-clamp/truncate classes)
Frontend: DirectoryPage shows all skills without +N truncation
Frontend: DirectoryPage shows MapPin icon with residing_in value
Frontend: DirectoryPage members sorted alphabetically by name
Frontend: OnboardingPage has residing_in input with placeholder 'e.g. Mumbai, India'
Frontend: ProfileEditDialog has residing_in input with placeholder 'e.g. Mumbai, India'
